# @sriharshavarada/br-ui-wrapper

Angular wrapper library containing:

- `br-grid`
- `br-modal`
- `br-date`
- `br-text`
- `br-single-select`
- `br-multi-select`
- `br-checkbox`
- `br-radio`
- `br-autocomplete`

## Build

```bash
ng build br-ui-wrapper
```

## Manual publish flow

```bash
cd dist/br-ui-wrapper
npm publish
```

`publishConfig.registry` is already set to GitHub Packages in the package manifest.
